compiled_state.title: Write behavioral test: 10-agent concurrent dispatch with MAX_AGENTS unlimited
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write a test that confirms with MAX_AGENTS: unlimited and no config cap, a batch of 10 independent stories dispatches 10 concurrent sub-agents with no intervening commit/push steps.

### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-max-agents-unlimited-dispatch.sh

### Test approach
Create a mock epic with 10 independent tasks (no file overlap, no dependency edges). Run sprint-next-batch.sh with --limit=unlimited. Assert BATCH_SIZE: 10 and 10 TASK: lines in output. Verify no SKIPPED_OPUS_CAP lines truncate below 10 (mock all as non-opus).

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-max-agents-unlimited-dispatch.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-max-agents-unlimited-dispatch.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-max-agents-unlimited-dispatch.sh
- [ ] Test passes confirming 10-agent dispatch
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-max-agents-unlimited-dispatch.sh
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — 10-agent dispatch test passing. Commit 47a01ec5.
comments.author: Test
